use_codes.desc: PREVENTION OF CHEMOTHERAPY-INDUCED NAUSEA AND VOMITING

USE IN COMBINATION WITH DEXAMETHASONE IN ADULTS FOR THE PREVENTION OF ACUTE AND DELAYED NAUSEA AND VOMITING ASSOCIATED WITH INITIAL AND REPEAT COURSES OF CANCER CHEMOTHERAPY, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, HIGHLY EMETOGENIC CHEMOTHERAPY
